name: part_002
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_002.webm

scenes.description: Narration by Shirakami Fubuki over an illustrated transition.
Omaru Polka and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'CIRCUS PANIC!!!'.

subtitles.original: 皆が指差し笑おうとも我は笑わない！
subtitles.english: Even if everyone points and laughs, I will not laugh!

subtitles.original: 正直に生きるお前が貶されて
subtitles.english: You, who live honestly, are disparaged

subtitles.original: 嘘で生きる奴らが徳となる世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live on lies are rewarded

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前の腕を離さない！
subtitles.english: I alone will not let go of your arm!

subtitles.original: 時を刻み忘れようとも我は離さない！
subtitles.english: Even if I forget the passing of time, I won't let go!

subtitles.original: 我は忘れない！
subtitles.english: I will not forget!

subtitles.original: 身を粉にして働いても
subtitles.english: Even if I work myself to the bone

subtitles.original: 感謝されないことも...
subtitles.english: And am not thanked for it...

subtitles.original: 「自己犠牲」を受け容れても
subtitles.english: Even if I accept "self-sacrifice"

subtitles.original: 限界がもうやってくるから
subtitles.english: Because the limit is already coming

subtitles.original: 自分を大事に愛せばいい
subtitles.english: Just love and cherish yourself

subtitles.original: それは他人を愛すること
subtitles.english: That is to love others

subtitles.original: あぁ人は滅んでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people are perishing

subtitles.original: 淀んでゆく
subtitles.english: Stagnating

subtitles.original: 元に戻ってゆく
subtitles.english: Returning to how they were

subtitles.original: あぁ人は泳いでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people are swimming

subtitles.original: 救われてゆく
subtitles.english: Being saved

subtitles.original: 君に逢えたから...
subtitles.english: Because I met you...

subtitles.original: 君を愛したから...
subtitles.english: Because I loved you...

subtitles.original: 君が戦うなら...
subtitles.english: If you fight...

subtitles.original: 僕も戦うから
subtitles.english: I will fight too

subtitles.original: 我武者羅に生きるお前が笑われて
subtitles.english: You, who live recklessly, are laughed at

subtitles.original: 楽に生きる奴らが徳をする世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live easily benefit

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前のことを笑わない！
subtitles.english: I alone will not laugh at you!

subtitles.original: 皆が指差し笑おうとも我は笑わない！
subtitles.english: Even if everyone points and laughs, I will not laugh!

subtitles.original: 正直に生きるお前が貶されて
subtitles.english: You, who live honestly, are disparaged

subtitles.original: 嘘で生きる奴らが徳となる世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live on lies are rewarded

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前の腕を離さない！
subtitles.english: I alone will not let go of your arm!

subtitles.original: 時を刻み忘れようとも我は離さない！
subtitles.english: Even if I forget the passing of time, I won't let go!

subtitles.original: 我は忘れない！
subtitles.english: I will not forget!

subtitles.original: 我は忘れない！
subtitles.english: I will not forget!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ今夜は、この王国のお話をしていこう。
subtitles.english: Well then, tonight, let's talk about this kingdom.

subtitles.original: 嘘か真か、ここに記されている本は
subtitles.english: Whether it's a lie or the truth, the book recorded here

subtitles.original: 内容がコロコロと変わってしまう、不思議な本でね。
subtitles.english: has contents that change all the time; it's a mysterious book.

subtitles.original: さて、今回はどんなお話になっているかな。
subtitles.english: Now, I wonder what kind of story it has become this time.

subtitles.original: これは、あるサーカスの一団が王国を訪れ、
subtitles.english: This is a story of a certain circus troupe visiting the kingdom,

subtitles.original: まだ未熟な座長さんが、煌びやかなステージに包まれたお話。
subtitles.english: and a still inexperienced troupe leader being enveloped by a brilliant stage.

subtitles.original: あぁ...これが私が望んだ夢のエンディング！
subtitles.english: Ah... this is the dream ending I wished for!

subtitles.original: さあ、今日も始まりました〜！
subtitles.english: Well, it has begun today as well!

subtitles.original: 煌びやか、享楽のパレード
subtitles.english: A brilliant parade of pleasure

subtitles.original: 常識もここじゃ無関係
subtitles.english: Common sense is irrelevant here

subtitles.original: 踊れ歌え騒げ全て忘れて
subtitles.english: Dance, sing, make noise, forget everything

subtitles.original: 細かいことは置いといて
subtitles.english: Put the details aside for now

subtitles.original: とりあえず身を任せてみな
subtitles.english: Just try to surrender yourself

subtitles.original: 幸福を少し分けるような饗宴
subtitles.english: A banquet that seems to share a bit of happiness

subtitles.original: Show Time!
subtitles.english: Show Time!

subtitles.original: 積もりゆく不安や後悔
subtitles.english: Accumulating anxiety and regret

subtitles.original: 今だけはちょっと目を背けて
subtitles.english: Just for now, look away for a bit

subtitles.original: そのままじゃ楽しめないじゃん
subtitles.english: You can't enjoy it as you are, right?

subtitles.original: この場だけは何もかもを忘れて
subtitles.english: Forget everything, just for this place

subtitles.original: 幾千の価値観全部
subtitles.english: Thousands of values, all of them

subtitles.original: 引っくるめ楽しませたげる！
subtitles.english: I'll bundle them up and entertain you!

subtitles.original: 百鬼夜行もビックリの
subtitles.english: Even the Night Parade of One Hundred Demons would be surprised

subtitles.original: 隊を成している
subtitles.english: They are forming a troop

subtitles.original: 怪奇模した喜劇が幕開け
subtitles.english: A comedy imitating the bizarre begins

subtitles.original: 一目見ればたちまち虜に！？
subtitles.english: If you take a look, you'll instantly be captivated!?

subtitles.original: どんな愛も受け入れてくれる
subtitles.english: Accepting any kind of love

subtitles.original: ここだけはあなたの理想郷
subtitles.english: Only here is your utopia

subtitles.original: 「もう間もなく主役の登場、
subtitles.english: The protagonist will appear very soon,

subtitles.original: 一時でも目を離さないで！」
subtitles.english: Don't take your eyes off for even a moment!"

subtitles.original: 眩いほどのステージが始まる。
subtitles.english: A dazzling stage begins.

subtitles.original: 騒々して
subtitles.english: Noisily

subtitles.original: 華々しいスポットライトの中
subtitles.english: In the middle of the brilliant spotlight

subtitles.original: 目を奪うような妙技の数々
subtitles.english: Numerous eye-catching feats

subtitles.original: この空間が世界で一番
subtitles.english: This space is the best in the world

subtitles.original: “娯楽”の名に相応しいんだ！
subtitles.english: It's worthy of the name "entertainment"!

subtitles.original: 割れんばかりの歓声と拍手で
subtitles.english: With deafening cheers and applause

subtitles.original: ショーは終わっていく
subtitles.english: The show is coming to an end

subtitles.original: 「まあ、これはあくまで理想の話なんですが^^;」
subtitles.english: Well, this is just an ideal story, though ^^;
